title: Lesson 85: (Grammar) - if; when; and; with; used for quoting (thoughts, s...

intro_cards.title: Particle と: 'And' / 'With'
intro_cards.body:
と has two main uses at N5:

1. Connecting nouns ('and' — exhaustive list):
• 猫と犬がいます。(There is a cat and a dog.)
• リンゴとバナナを買いました。(I bought apples and bananas.)

Note: と lists ALL items. For a partial list, use や instead.

2. Together with someone:
• 友達と映画を見ました。(I watched a movie with a friend.)
• 先生と話しました。(I spoke with the teacher.)

と also marks quotation content — see the quotation と lesson.
